caption: A man wearing a white button-down shirt, tan suspenders, a bow tie, and glasses is speaking into a professional microphone in a studio setting. He wears a large, grey, stylized wig that stands tall on his head and over-ear headphones. To his left, a microphone is mounted on a stand, featuring a red and white logo that reads "THE TALK" above the word "PODCAST". To his right, a red and white graphic displays the text "BOSS TALK 101" with "By: T. Williams" underneath. The background consists of a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs of various sizes and a shelving unit holding folded clothing and a sign that reads "LEE". Across the sequence of frames, the man remains in a stationary position, speaking with slight shifts in his facial expression and head posture, while the background and equipment remain constant.
